name: Nobody's House
overview: Nobody's House is a 1976 British children's fantasy-drama programme produced by Tyne Tees Television for ITV. The seven-episode series follows a mischievous ghost named Nobody, a teenage Victorian orphan who haunts a house, visible only to the two children of the newly arrived Sinclair family.

trailers.title: Nobody's House - 4k - Opening credits - 1976 - ITV / Tyne Tees Television
